content.problemStatement:
### **Aptitude Practice Question**

A person pays $8000 as an amount on the sum of $6000 that he had borrowed for 3 years. What will be the rate of interest?

---

### **Answer & Explanation**

A = $8000P = $6000Amount = Principal  + Simple Interest

SI = A – P 
= 8000 – 6000 
= $2000
Time (t) = 3 years
Rate (R) = ?

SI = (P × R ×T) / 100

R = (SI × 100) /(P × T)
R = (2000 × 100 /(6000 × 3)  
= 11.11 %

Thus, rate of interest R is 11.11 %.
